ol.li: M1 (Fixed): O(1) alloc, intrustive pointers, memory alignment.
M2 (Growth): Dynamic chunking, non-contiguous heap expansion.
M3 (Hardened): Thread-safe locking, buffer canaries, poisoning.

div.p: Free blocks store next pointer inside their own memory segment: [ next_ptr | unused_padding... ]
Blocks from non-contiguous chunks all live on the same global list: C1[B0] -> C2[B5] -> C1[B1] -> NULL
